design_philosophy: Elegant, high-end minimalist style. A premium 'spa-medical' feel utilizing soft warm neutrals, champagne gold accents, and deep sophisticated contrast. Generous whitespace and rounded bento-style cards convey calm and exclusivity.

scale.subtitle: text-xs sm:text-sm font-semibold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[#B89953]

spacing_and_layout.bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 w-full bg-[#FFFFFF]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-[#EBE5DC] pb-safe pt-2 px-4 z-50 h-20

components.cards: White background (`bg-white`), `rounded-3xl`, subtle shadow (`shadow-soft`). Often include a gold circular icon container (`bg-[#F4ECD8] text-[#B89953] rounded-full p-3`).

buttons.primary: bg-[#C5A059] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-[#B89953] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F4F0EA] text-[#2C2A26] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-[#EBE5DC] transition-colors

components.promo_card: 16:9 aspect ratio image container, rounded-2xl overflow-hidden relative. Content overlay with linear gradient from bottom. Gold pill badge absolute top-left.
components.loyalty_stamp: A 10-slot bento grid. Empty slots: `bg-[#F4F0EA] rounded-full border border-[#EBE5DC] flex items-center justify-center`. Filled slots: `bg-[#C5A059] text-white shadow-md flex items-center justify-center`. Milestone slots (3, 6, 10) have special gold border or icon highlighting the reward.
components.bottom_nav_tab: Flex col, items-center, gap-1. Active state gets a background pill `bg-[#F0E9DF]` behind the icon, text becomes primary color.

icons.style: strokeWidth={1.5} for a delicate, premium look. Gold color for primary actions.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle -translate-y-1 and increased shadow for cards.
motion_and_interactions.admin_trigger: 5 consecutive taps on a small lock icon or subtle element in the footer opens the password-protected admin login modal.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
Implement the 4-tab Bottom Navigation (Hjem, Bestill, Lojalitet, Kontakt).
Embed iframe for Bestill (Booking) and Gavekort (Gift card).
Implement Loyalty stamp card (10 stamps) with a QR code modal to show patient ID.
Implement an Admin Panel hidden behind 5-taps on a footer lock icon. It must include password protection, a QR scanner for stamps, and a basic CRUD for 'Aktuelle Tilbud' (Current Offers).
Ensure the visual language matches the 'cream/beige background, serif title, gold underline accents, rounded white cards' specification explicitly.
Avoid Shadcn 'Card' defaults if they conflict with the rounded-3xl / shadow-soft requirement. Build custom Tailwind cards or override Shadcn thoroughly.
Use Manrope for body text and Cormorant Garamond for headings. Install them via Google Fonts.
